特記事項: 【合併】総合日本学習科目（日本のビジネスB）（CIEC）/Japanese Business B（国際学部）
授業方法: Seminar. By discussing real world cases of business success and failure in Japan and practicing cross cultural communication techniques, students will develop a portfolio of best practices in business communication and management. At the beginning of each class students will present a summary of the assigned case study or reading followed by class discussions that will be supplemented by materials from the instructor.

第1回:
【Startup Week】"No video"
Online class (task-based)／《90minutes》
Theme: Introduction to Business in Japan
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Japanese Consumer Behaviour
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Market Entry in Japan
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第4回: Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: PESTLE, SWOT & Porters Five Forces
第6回: Reading of assigned case study and preparation for class discussion.
第7回: Reading of assigned case study and preparation for class discussion.
第8回: Preparation for presentation of case study in class.
第9回: Preparation for presentation of case study in class.
第10回: Preparation for presentation of case study in class.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Writing a Case Study Analysis
第12回:
【Core Week 11】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Japanese Negotiation Styles and Decision-Making Process
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第13回:
【Core Week 12】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Different Working Styles in Japan
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第14回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (task-based)／《180minutes》
Theme: Summary and Wrap-up
トピック.授業外学習2: Students are expected to prepare for each class by reading the assigned materials, participate in class discussions and present an own case study in class. Students will also require time to write an own case study analysis.

教科書/Required texts0:
A reading list of relevant articles will be provided in the first class.
For the discussion of case studies we will use the following book: 
Tim Craig & Matthias Hennings (2022). Competing in the Japanese Market: A Case Study Approach
Details will be provided in the first class.
参考文献・資料/Reference books0: Tim Craig & Matthias Hennings (2022). Competing in the Japanese Market: A Case Study Approach
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1
